0.text: CA 002/2023 (1) Gate Mena DMCC (Formerly Huobi OTC DMCC) (2) Huobi Mena FZE v (1) Tabarak Investment Capital Limited (2) Christian Thurner

3.text: THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL CENTRE COURTS

6.text: (1) GATE MENA DMCC (FORMERLY HUOBI OTC DMCC) (2) HUOBI MENA FZE

9.text: (1) TABARAK INVESTMENT CAPITAL LIMITED (2) CHRISTIAN THURNER

12.text: UPON paragraph 4 of the judgment of the Court of Appeal dated 13 June 2024 (the “Judgment”) directing that “the parties shall fi le written submissions on costs within 7 days of the date of this Judgment”

13.text: AND UPON the Consent Orders dated 28 June 2024 and 12 July 2024

14.text: AND UPON the parties fi ling written Cost Submissions on 15 July 2024

15.text: AND UPON the Judge’s direction communicated by email on 19 July 2024 timed at 08:35 via the DIFC Court’s Registry that the parties have permission to serve brief Reply Submissions of no more than 5 pages by no later than 4pm on 26 July 2024 (the “Direction”)

16.text: AND UPON the parties having agreed by consent to vary the Direction

17.text: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED BY CONSENT THAT:

18.text: 1. The parties shall fi le and serve brief Reply Submissions (if any) of no more than 5 pages by no later than 4pm on 16 August 2024.

19.text: 2. There shall be no order as to costs.

20.text: 3. The parties shall have liberty to apply.
